nodes.context: Osaka-based yakuza gang, known for bellicosity, formerly affiliated with Yamaguchi-gumi.
Kobe-based yakuza group, Japan's largest, parent organization of Nakano-kai before 1997.

edges.evidence_quote: Before 1997, the Nakano-kai had been an affiliate of the Kobe -based Yamaguchi-gumi , Japan's largest yakuza group.
edges.context: Nakano-kai was an affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi before 1997.

edges.evidence_quote: But in July of that year, the Nakano-kai broke spectacularly from its parent in a violent attack that led to the group's disbanding.
edges.context: Nakano-kai broke from Yamaguchi-gumi in a violent attack, indicating conflict.
